courses.title: QA engineer
courses.description: Every time you use a website or an app, you see the result of their work. QA engineers test software and improve its speed by identifying and fixing errors. They also create detailed test plans and automate this process.
goals: Review all main types of testing and project documentation
Gain practical knowledge of the main stages of quality assurance
Learn to work with bug-tracking systems
Learn to test Web services and API

courses.title: Front-end developer
courses.description: Every time you use a website or an app, you see the result of their work. Front-end developers create visual elements and interfaces, adapt them for different devices, and add animations. They also work with databases.
goals: Learn to interact with servers using JavaScript
Learn to work with REST APIs
Learn all the features of the React library

courses.title: UI/UX designer
courses.description: Every time you use a website or app, you see their work. UI/UX designers create interface designs and make them intuitive. They also adapt designs for different devices and conduct user research to improve their solutions.
goals: Learn to solve user problems using CJM maps
Learn to design mobile app interfaces for Android and iOS
Learn to create UX and UI design based on data

courses.title: Data Analyst
courses.description: Every time you use a website or app, a data analyst collects and analyzes data to improve your experience. They create reports that help businesses make informed decisions. They use various tools and techniques to analyze trends.
goals: Teach students to use SQL, Python, and Power BI to analyze data and solve practical problems.
Give them the chance to practice through real tasks that strengthen their knowledge and build experience.
